title: Repository Metrics
description: Repository health metrics produced by the collect-metrics action / script.

collectedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when metrics were collected

lookbackDays.description: Number of days covered by time-windowed metrics

openIssues.description: Total number of open issues at collection time

mergedPrs.description: Number of PRs merged in the lookback window

openPrs.description: Number of open PRs at collection time

commitCount.description: Number of commits in the lookback window (null if unavailable)

contributors.description: Number of unique contributors in the lookback window (null if unavailable)

ciSuccessRatePct.description: CI workflow success rate as a percentage (null if no runs in window)
